title: Basic JavaScript Algorithms Basics

title: Intermediate JavaScript Algorithms Basics

title: Advanced JavaScript Algorithms Basics Project
description: Build a small application that applies Big O notation, Time complexity, Space complexity in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Algorithms Basics
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Big O notation and Time complexity.
